title: How Anthropic Engineers ACTUALLY Prompt Claude Code
summary: Austin Marchese presents four rules for prompting Claude Code effectively, derived from studying Anthropic engineers' practices: prompt skills rather than Claude directly, recognize that skills extend beyond prompts, build composable skills instead of custom ones, and expect skills to improve with each session. The video argues most users are approaching prompting incorrectly.
